dj_text: That Pirate Bot DJ Radio — KA-BOOM! In the multiverse where Lykken Kommer won, Kroppen Og Mit Ansigt (Gråvejr) is the punishment. Welcome.
commercial_text: Welcome to Quiet FM from the Null Kosmos. Shhhh. This is the quiet dimension. No talking. No music. Just...
hijack_text: Truth Frequency Radio from the Mirror Dimension.
recovery_text: They're on our frequency AGAIN. We're changing the dimensional locks.
title: Kroppen Og Mit Ansigt (Gråvejr)
